_note: Strength formula: score = elo_intl + (xi_blend - avg_xi_blend) * club_adj_weight. Match probabilities use the ELO expected-score curve with elo_lambda_scale to split a fixed 2 * base_goals_per_team goal expectation, plus a small XI line-matchup adjustment and a parity-aware draw_bias correction on the 1X2 outcome.
_calibration_note: v1.3 calibrated 2026-06-09 via scripts/calibration_report.py --grid: draw_rate 15.3%->25.5%, blowout_3plus 31.8%->19.7%, goals/match 2.46, intermediate points mass (1,2,4,5,7) 38.8%->56.9%. elo_lambda_scale=800 (legacy divisor equivalent 1600) is above the 400-600 grid because the strength spread reaches ~800 ELO; smaller scales keep blowouts above 20%.
_reserved_v1_4: fecha1_caution_draw_boost and fecha3_context_draw_boost are reserved for v1.4 matchday-context logic; the engine does not read them yet.
